title: with_ecc/ed25519/curve25519_key: doc omits evict-on-error-path semantics
description: In src/crypto/ecc.rs, ed25519.rs, and curve25519.rs, the with_xxx_key helper doc comments say only 'Guarantees the HSM cache slot is released even when f returns Err.' They do not document the asymmetric error behavior that with_rsa_key does document: on error path the eviction error is swallowed and the original error is returned; on the success path the eviction error is surfaced. A contributor who copies the ecc/ed25519/curve25519 doc comment will miss this subtle behavior. Bring the doc comments in line with with_rsa_key.
